creator: ve2tmq@gmail.com
text:
This bug appear after upgrade to FreeBSD 14.0.

OpenVPN configure as topology subnet, crash while initiate tunnel, after TLS handshake.

2023-11-24 23:49:26 Note: --client-to-client has no effect when using data channel offload: packets are always sent to the VPN interface and then routed based on the system routing table
2023-11-24 23:49:26 OpenVPN 2.6.8 amd64-portbld-freebsd14.0 [SSL (OpenSSL)] [LZO] [LZ4] [PKCS11] [MH/RECVDA] [AEAD] [DCO]
2023-11-24 23:49:26 library versions: OpenSSL 3.0.12 24 Oct 2023, LZO 2.10
2023-11-24 23:49:26 DCO version: FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE #0 releng/14.0-n265380-f9716eee8ab4: Fri Nov 10 05:57:23 UTC 2023     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC
2023-11-24 23:49:26 Diffie-Hellman initialized with 1024 bit key
2023-11-24 23:49:26 DCO device tun0 opened
